source.title: Star Atlas Event Recap 79: Atlas Brew #202 – Updates and Upgrades

article_text:
In this episode, hear an AI summary of the latest Star Atlas community event. Full video recordings can be found on the YouTube channel of Star Atlas TV at https://www.youtube.com/@staratlastv.
Listen on Apple Podcasts
Listen on Spotify
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5Kir9SzaW6E
Star Atlas Event Summary
Hi, this isn’t Matt with the Intergalactic Herald. I am an AI. Welcome to a Star Atlas Recap of the latest Atlas Brew from the Star Atlas Community Team. The following summary of the Atlas Brew was AI generated so no guarantee it is 100% accurate because I am an AI after all. If you want to listen to the entire recording, please check out the YouTube channel of Star Atlas TV. Enjoy the summary. Welcome back to the recap of Atlas Brew episode 202! If you missed the live session, you missed a heavy dose of alpha, gameplay reveals, and a deep dive into the future of the Star Atlas ecosystem. The vibe this week was electric, with the team showcasing how they’re pushing the boundaries of Unreal Engine 5 and the upcoming Zinc network. We kicked things off with an update on Ember Coil, the first Star Atlas tabletop RPG campaign. This project aims to expand the game’s lore through a high-stakes podcast, and the community response has been massive. With 21 applications already in, Jose teased that the community will have a hand in voting to decide who makes the final cut for the table. While lore is expanding, the DAO is also heating up. A reminder went out to all players to get their votes in for the current PIPS, including the PG proposal and the upcoming tournament PIP—your POLIS power is your voice, so make sure it’s heard! The spotlight then shifted to community developer Funcracker, who unveiled two major tools. First is Atlas Relay, a platform where players can submit 60-second gameplay clips to earn ATLAS rewards. It’s a crowdsourced marketing engine designed to get those stunning UE5 visuals in front of the world. He also debuted a revived Stats Dashboard, bringing back much-needed data transparency for the ecosystem, game economy, and tokenomics. On the gameplay front, Brad took us on a wild ride through the latest UE5 developments. The big breakthrough this week? Surface navigation for AI. We finally saw bots navigating the uneven terrain of planetary surfaces, paving the way for “Elimination” missions. Brad gave us a live demo of an infiltration mission on Morivia, showing off stealth mechanics, alarm systems, and high-intensity combat. But the real showstopper was the ocean revamp. We saw incredible new water physics where ships and airbikes don’t just fly over water—they ride the waves like jet skis, complete with immersive sound design and underwater environments. Brad even took a moment to show off the local wildlife, finding a herd of “Minkies” roaming the plains, hinting at a living, breathing world where hunting and gathering will eventually play a role. To bring it all home, CEO Michael Wagner dropped in to share some “engineered art” of the Zinc dashboard. We got a first look at the vesting and claims portal, which will feature a 5% unlock at Genesis and a 180-day vesting period for the rest. Michael highlighted how the team is using cutting-edge AI agents to move two to three times faster than before, allowing them to iterate on complex features in days rather than months. He confirmed that the Origin campaign will run right up until the Zinc Mainnet launch, which will coincide with the highly anticipated C4 launch. It was a jam-packed session that proved the Star Atlas vision is more alive than ever. Between the new leaderboard prizes for Holosene Chapter 2—including some “super sick” vessels like the MR8—and the looming C4 PTR, there’s plenty to get excited about. Your call to action: Head over to the DAO to cast your votes, start recording your best clips for Atlas Relay, and keep an eye out for the upcoming Zinc documentation. The tide is turning, and as the team says: Soon. We’ll see you at the next Brew!
I am launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
I am also creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
Star Atlas Weekly Recap Newsletter – Catch up on all the important videos and articles from the Star Atlas community in a weekly recap email newsletter. https://intergalacticherald.com/star-atlas-weekly-recap-newsletter/
Star Atlas Week in Review Podcast – Audio podcast where I break down everything that happened in Star Atlas the past week plus my analysis on what it all means. https://intergalacticherald.com/podcast/
Star Atlas Discord News Feed Newsletter – Star Atlas Discord announcements send directly to your email so you never miss out on updates from the Star Atlas team. https://intergalacticherald.com/star-atlas-discord-news-feed/
If you would like to support my efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
